title: Apple FY2024 Balance Sheet Reconstruction
summary: Extract Apple Inc.'s FY2024 Consolidated Balance Sheet from its Form 10-K and return a structured JSON report with exact USD-million values.
taskPrompt: You are working on a Linux VM as a financial statement extraction analyst. Read Apple's FY2024 Form 10-K PDF or SEC HTML filing, reconstruct the fiscal 2024 Consolidated Balance Sheet, and write `output/balance_sheet.json` using the required schema and exact USD-million values.
agentMustDo: Locate the Consolidated Balance Sheets in the staged Apple FY2024 Form 10-K materials.
Extract the September 28, 2024 value for every required field in the schema.
Write `output/balance_sheet.json` without modifying staged input files.

inputFiles.name: aapl-20240928.htm
inputFiles.description: SEC EDGAR HTML filing for the same 10-K.

referenceFiles.name: balance_sheet.json
referenceFiles.description: Structured balance-sheet output produced by the agent.

evaluation: The evaluator compares every numeric leaf under `consolidated_balance_sheet` against hidden reference values exactly and returns the fraction of correct fields. Missing or malformed JSON returns `0.0`.

classifier.rationale: The task involves reconstructing a financial statement, which falls under accounting and finance.
